title: No equivalent circuit is output by `write_verilog`

features.name: jump state machine in nested combinational loops
features.description: Code should include a 2-bit jump state machine variable controlling nested loop break behavior in a combinational always block

features.name: variable-length part select with clog2 in procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include an indexed part select with variable length using $clog2 computation inside a loop in an always block

features.name: opt_muxtree conditional assignment in always block
features.description: Code should include an always @* block with conditional signal assignments that interact with a jump state machine, processed through opt_muxtree optimization
